local_policy_gap_audit.local_policy_document_needed: Provider safeguarding policy plus current LSCP procedures.
local_policy_gap_audit.safe_without_local_policy: Give national safeguarding principles, recording prompts, and remind staff to follow local procedures.
local_policy_gap_audit.must_not_decide_without_local_policy: Do not decide thresholds, referral route, named local contacts, or timescales.
local_policy_gap_audit.escalation_prompt: Escalate to the DSL/manager and follow LSCP procedures; call emergency services for immediate danger.
local_policy_gap_audit.manager_oversight_prompt: Manager confirms threshold, referral route, recording, and follow-up oversight.

local_policy_gap_audit.local_policy_document_needed: Allegations against adults/LADO procedure and HR escalation policy.
local_policy_gap_audit.safe_without_local_policy: Prompt factual recording, child safety, preservation of evidence, and urgent manager review.
local_policy_gap_audit.must_not_decide_without_local_policy: Do not decide LADO referral, suspension, investigation outcome, or staff conduct finding.
local_policy_gap_audit.escalation_prompt: Escalate immediately to the registered manager/senior leader and local LADO route.
local_policy_gap_audit.manager_oversight_prompt: Manager records the LADO decision route, child safety actions, and staff oversight plan.

local_policy_gap_audit.local_policy_document_needed: Missing from care protocol, police compact, return interview process, and escalation thresholds.
local_policy_gap_audit.safe_without_local_policy: Prompt chronology, risk indicators, return conversation, and child-centred follow-up.
local_policy_gap_audit.must_not_decide_without_local_policy: Do not decide police grading, local notification sequence, or return interview arrangements.
local_policy_gap_audit.escalation_prompt: Escalate to manager and police/local authority route according to the local protocol.
local_policy_gap_audit.manager_oversight_prompt: Manager confirms missing episode category, notifications, return interview, and risk plan update.

local_policy_gap_audit.local_policy_document_needed: Provider behaviour support/positive relationships policy.
local_policy_gap_audit.safe_without_local_policy: Support therapeutic, non-punitive reflection and what the child may be communicating.
local_policy_gap_audit.must_not_decide_without_local_policy: Do not approve sanctions, incentives, exclusions, or behaviour plans.
local_policy_gap_audit.escalation_prompt: Escalate where behaviour indicates harm, restrictive practice, or placement instability.
local_policy_gap_audit.manager_oversight_prompt: Manager reviews proportionality, the child's plan, patterns, and staff support needs.

local_policy_gap_audit.local_policy_document_needed: Physical intervention/restraint/restrictive practice policy and training model.
local_policy_gap_audit.safe_without_local_policy: Prompt post-incident recording, debrief, child voice, injury checks, and least-restrictive reflection.
local_policy_gap_audit.must_not_decide_without_local_policy: Do not approve restraint, restriction, deprivation of liberty, or intervention training competence.
local_policy_gap_audit.escalation_prompt: Escalate any restraint, injury, restriction, or deprivation concern to manager and safeguarding route.
local_policy_gap_audit.manager_oversight_prompt: Manager reviews necessity, proportionality, notifications, debriefs, and pattern analysis.

local_policy_gap_audit.local_policy_document_needed: Search, confiscation, room checks, CCTV/surveillance, privacy, and prohibited items policy.
local_policy_gap_audit.safe_without_local_policy: Prompt dignity, consent where possible, factual recording, and privacy impact questions.
local_policy_gap_audit.must_not_decide_without_local_policy: Do not approve searches, confiscation, surveillance, monitoring, or room checks.
local_policy_gap_audit.escalation_prompt: Escalate to manager before intrusive action unless immediate safety risk requires emergency response.
local_policy_gap_audit.manager_oversight_prompt: Manager confirms lawful basis, proportionality, recording, child rights impact, and review date.

local_policy_gap_audit.local_policy_document_needed: Medication administration, storage, consent, PRN, controlled drugs, and errors policy.
local_policy_gap_audit.safe_without_local_policy: Prompt factual medication-record checks and escalation to health professionals for clinical questions.
local_policy_gap_audit.must_not_decide_without_local_policy: Do not advise dosage, administration, refusal handling, PRN use, or error classification.
local_policy_gap_audit.escalation_prompt: Escalate medication uncertainty, refusal, error, or side effect concern to manager and health professional.
local_policy_gap_audit.manager_oversight_prompt: Manager confirms MAR audit, error route, health advice, and notification duties.

local_policy_gap_audit.local_policy_document_needed: Provider complaints procedure, Children's Guide complaints route, and advocacy details.
local_policy_gap_audit.safe_without_local_policy: Explain that children must know how to complain and be supported to access advocacy.
local_policy_gap_audit.must_not_decide_without_local_policy: Do not decide complaint stage, response deadline, investigator, or outcome.
local_policy_gap_audit.escalation_prompt: Escalate unresolved or safeguarding-related complaints to manager and safeguarding route.
local_policy_gap_audit.manager_oversight_prompt: Manager confirms complaint logging, response route, advocacy offer, and learning actions.

local_policy_gap_audit.local_policy_document_needed: Whistleblowing/speaking-up policy, protected disclosure route, and responsible contacts.
local_policy_gap_audit.safe_without_local_policy: Encourage speaking up, factual recording, and protection from victimisation.
local_policy_gap_audit.must_not_decide_without_local_policy: Do not decide protected disclosure status, investigation route, or employment action.
local_policy_gap_audit.escalation_prompt: Escalate serious concerns to senior leadership, safeguarding route, regulator, or prescribed body as required.
local_policy_gap_audit.manager_oversight_prompt: Manager confirms confidentiality, non-retaliation, investigation route, and safeguarding interface.

local_policy_gap_audit.local_policy_document_needed: Fire risk assessment, evacuation plan, PEEPs, drill records, and emergency procedures.
local_policy_gap_audit.safe_without_local_policy: Prompt checks that current fire arrangements and competent-person assessments are followed.
local_policy_gap_audit.must_not_decide_without_local_policy: Do not approve evacuation strategy, PEEP sufficiency, fire risk rating, or premises safety.
local_policy_gap_audit.escalation_prompt: Escalate fire safety uncertainty, equipment faults, or evacuation risk to manager/competent person immediately.
local_policy_gap_audit.manager_oversight_prompt: Manager confirms competent-person advice, action tracking, drills, and child-specific evacuation support.

local_policy_gap_audit.local_policy_document_needed: Health and safety policy, risk assessments, COSHH, infection control, food hygiene, and maintenance procedures.
local_policy_gap_audit.safe_without_local_policy: Prompt factual hazard recording and immediate action to reduce obvious risk.
local_policy_gap_audit.must_not_decide_without_local_policy: Do not approve risk assessments, competent-person controls, RIDDOR reporting, or maintenance sign-off.
local_policy_gap_audit.escalation_prompt: Escalate hazards, incidents, illness outbreaks, or premises risk to manager and competent person.
local_policy_gap_audit.manager_oversight_prompt: Manager confirms risk assessment owner, remedial actions, reporting duties, and review date.

local_policy_gap_audit.local_policy_document_needed: Transport, driving at work, vehicle checks, community activity, and off-site risk assessment policy.
local_policy_gap_audit.safe_without_local_policy: Prompt planning questions about consent, supervision, transport safety, and child-specific risks.
local_policy_gap_audit.must_not_decide_without_local_policy: Do not approve activities, staffing ratios, drivers, vehicles, or off-site risk controls.
local_policy_gap_audit.escalation_prompt: Escalate uncertainty, higher-risk activities, or transport incidents to manager before proceeding.
local_policy_gap_audit.manager_oversight_prompt: Manager confirms activity approval, dynamic risk assessment, vehicle checks, and contingency plan.

local_policy_gap_audit.local_policy_document_needed: Internet, devices, online safety, monitoring, filtering, and acceptable-use policy.
local_policy_gap_audit.safe_without_local_policy: Prompt online safety reflection, child voice, risk indicators, and safeguarding escalation where needed.
local_policy_gap_audit.must_not_decide_without_local_policy: Do not approve device restrictions, monitoring, searches, filtering, or sanctions.
local_policy_gap_audit.escalation_prompt: Escalate exploitation, grooming, harmful content, or image-sharing concerns to safeguarding lead/manager.
local_policy_gap_audit.manager_oversight_prompt: Manager confirms restrictions are proportionate, recorded, reviewed, and linked to the child's plan.

local_policy_gap_audit.local_policy_document_needed: Pocket money, possessions, valuables, savings, financial safeguarding, and deductions policy.
local_policy_gap_audit.safe_without_local_policy: Prompt dignity, transparency, child voice, receipts, and avoidance of punitive deductions.
local_policy_gap_audit.must_not_decide_without_local_policy: Do not approve deductions, withholding, searches, disposal, or financial decisions.
local_policy_gap_audit.escalation_prompt: Escalate missing money, suspected exploitation, or disputed possessions to manager.
local_policy_gap_audit.manager_oversight_prompt: Manager confirms records, consent, financial safeguards, and advocacy where disputed.

local_policy_gap_audit.local_policy_document_needed: Family time/contact policy, care plan arrangements, supervision requirements, and risk controls.
local_policy_gap_audit.safe_without_local_policy: Prompt child voice, emotional impact, factual contact recording, and plan-review questions.
local_policy_gap_audit.must_not_decide_without_local_policy: Do not approve, restrict, supervise, or cancel family time/contact.
local_policy_gap_audit.escalation_prompt: Escalate distress, safeguarding indicators, or contact-plan conflict to manager/social worker.
local_policy_gap_audit.manager_oversight_prompt: Manager confirms care plan authority, risk controls, records, and child's wishes.

local_policy_gap_audit.local_policy_document_needed: Risk assessment, dynamic risk, positive risk-taking, and review policy.
local_policy_gap_audit.safe_without_local_policy: Prompt evidence, protective factors, child voice, and uncertainty without approving the risk.
local_policy_gap_audit.must_not_decide_without_local_policy: Do not approve risk level, controls, staffing, restrictions, or activity decisions.
local_policy_gap_audit.escalation_prompt: Escalate changing, high, or unclear risk to manager and relevant professional network.
local_policy_gap_audit.manager_oversight_prompt: Manager confirms risk rating, controls, proportionality, review date, and multi-agency input.

local_policy_gap_audit.local_policy_document_needed: Business continuity, emergency relocation, severe weather, IT outage, and major incident plan.
local_policy_gap_audit.safe_without_local_policy: Prompt immediate welfare, continuity questions, and record of actions taken.
local_policy_gap_audit.must_not_decide_without_local_policy: Do not approve relocation, closure, staffing contingency, or communication plan.
local_policy_gap_audit.escalation_prompt: Escalate any continuity risk to responsible manager/senior leader and placing authorities where needed.
local_policy_gap_audit.manager_oversight_prompt: Manager confirms contingency activation, communications, child impact, and recovery actions.

local_policy_gap_audit.local_policy_document_needed: Staff supervision, reflective practice, probation, capability, and management oversight policy.
local_policy_gap_audit.safe_without_local_policy: Prompt reflective supervision themes and child-impact questions.
local_policy_gap_audit.must_not_decide_without_local_policy: Do not decide supervision frequency exceptions, capability action, or employment outcome.
local_policy_gap_audit.escalation_prompt: Escalate practice concerns, missed supervision, or safeguarding patterns to manager.
local_policy_gap_audit.manager_oversight_prompt: Manager confirms supervision cadence, reflective actions, training needs, and accountability trail.

local_policy_gap_audit.local_policy_document_needed: Lone working, staffing levels, on-call, staff safety, and emergency support policy.
local_policy_gap_audit.safe_without_local_policy: Prompt staff safety checks, wellbeing reflection, and escalation where risk is unclear.
local_policy_gap_audit.must_not_decide_without_local_policy: Do not approve lone working, staffing sufficiency, or on-call arrangements.
local_policy_gap_audit.escalation_prompt: Escalate lone-working or staffing safety concerns to manager/on-call leader immediately.
local_policy_gap_audit.manager_oversight_prompt: Manager confirms staffing risk assessment, on-call support, incident review, and staff wellbeing actions.

local_policy_gap_audit.local_policy_document_needed: Visitors, contractors, professional visits, ID checks, supervision, and safer access policy.
local_policy_gap_audit.safe_without_local_policy: Prompt identity, purpose, supervision, child privacy, and record-keeping questions.
local_policy_gap_audit.must_not_decide_without_local_policy: Do not approve access, unsupervised presence, contractor work, or visitor restrictions.
local_policy_gap_audit.escalation_prompt: Escalate unknown, disputed, unsafe, or safeguarding-related visits to manager.
local_policy_gap_audit.manager_oversight_prompt: Manager confirms access decision, safeguards, records, and any child-specific restrictions.

local_policy_gap_audit.local_policy_document_needed: Data protection, records access, SAR, retention, redaction, and DPO escalation policy.
local_policy_gap_audit.safe_without_local_policy: Prompt lawful, respectful records practice and remind staff to involve the data protection lead.
local_policy_gap_audit.must_not_decide_without_local_policy: Do not decide disclosure, redaction, withholding, retention, or SAR deadline handling.
local_policy_gap_audit.escalation_prompt: Escalate records access, disclosure, breach, or SAR questions to manager/DPO.
local_policy_gap_audit.manager_oversight_prompt: Manager confirms DPO involvement, child impact, redaction route, timescales, and audit trail.
